title: UIA GetSupportedPatterns forbidden on MFC
desc: Calling GetSupportedPatterns() on MFC owner-drawn controls causes COM state corruption. Use individual TryGetCurrentPattern() calls per needed pattern instead.
steps: Do NOT call el.GetSupportedPatterns() on MFC controls
Instead: try InvokePattern p; el.TryGetCurrentPattern(InvokePattern.Pattern, out p)
Wrap each TryGetCurrentPattern in try-catch (COM exceptions possible)
For scroll pattern specifically: use el.Patterns.Scroll.IsSupported (safe property)
author: claude
